metrics_dashboard_description: Aggregated product metrics for the selected date range (UTC). Requires admin, team, or space-host.
metrics_dashboard_funnels_intro: Step counts in your selected range. Bar width is relative to the largest step in each card. The badge is a simple end-of-funnel rate vs the first audience step.

metrics_live_subtitle: Sessions active in the last hour (updates every 15 seconds).
metrics_live_empty: No activity in the last hour.

stay_create_apply_credits_disabled_no_ba: You don't have any credits available to apply.
stay_create_apply_credits_disabled_no_el: Credits only apply to the accommodation amount priced in credits. This booking doesn't include an eligible portion.
stay_create_credits_modal_description: You will spend credits from your balance toward this stay. This sets how you pay for the accommodation priced in credits before you finish checkout.
stay_create_credits_modal_warning: Credits applied to a booking are not refundable. This cannot be undone except as described in the cancellation policy.

stay_create_stake_modal_warning: This lock is permanent for the lock period. You will not be able to cancel the token lock or get a refund.
stay_create_stake_modal_tokens_owed_vs_o: This booking has {owed} $TDF left to settle with tokens in total. This wallet transaction only locks {onChain} $TDF for accommodation nights on-chain.
stay_create_token_stake_plan_error: Could not prepare token staking for this booking. Please review your dates and token amount.
stay_create_token_stake_year_not_active: Token booking is not enabled on-chain for calendar year {year}. An admin may need to enable accommodation bookings for that year in the DAO contract.
stay_create_token_stake_tx_reverted: The on-chain stake transaction was mined but reverted. No tokens were locked for these nights. Check the transaction in your wallet’s block explorer, or confirm allowance, balance, and that token booking is enabled for this year.
stay_create_token_stake_failed: Token staking failed. Please try again.
stay_create_stake_error_user_rejected: You rejected the transaction in your wallet.
stay_create_token_stake_refresh_hint: A token lock is already on-chain for these nights. If you just signed a transaction, wait a moment and refresh this page, or try confirming again.
stay_create_token_stake_existing_conflic: A token lock already exists for these dates. Please contact support if this was not you.
stay_create_same_day_tokens_not_supporte: Same-day booking is not supported with $TDF token staking.

subscriptions_success_thank_you_message: Thank you!! Happy to have you coming home and making dreams come true 💭
subscriptions_success_next_steps: You can view, change and cancel your subscription from your account profile.
subscriptions_terms_full_text: This is the full text of the terms and conditions
subscriptions_why_intro: {platformName} only exists because people from around the world decided to back a small village in the Alentejo. Friends is the lightest way to keep that going, and to stay woven into the daily life of the place even if you cannot be here.
subscriptions_citizen_eligible: 👋🏼 You are eligible to become a member!
subscriptions_citizen_good_to_go_intro: Being a Traditional Dream Factory (TDF) Member means that TDF is one of your homes. That comes with many advantages and also certain duties and responsibilities - "with great power, great responsibility".
subscriptions_citizen_good_why: Why do you want to become a member? (required)
subscriptions_citizen_good_how: How do you wish to contribute to TDF?
subscriptions_citizen_not_eligible: 👋🏼 You are not eligible to become a member just yet
subscriptions_citizen_not_eligible_reaso: Here is why you are currently unable to apply for a TDF Citizensheep:
subscriptions_citizen_report_mistake: Is there a mistake? Please let us know at
subscriptions_citizen_stayed_for_min_dur: You spent at least 14 days at TDF in the past two years
subscriptions_citizen_vouched_by_n_membe: You have been vouched for by {var} other members
subscriptions_citizen_space_host_vouch_r: and at least one space host
subscriptions_citizen_no_reports: You have not been reported by other members

I own 30+ tokens & I wish to finance 30+ tokens
subscriptions_citizen_connect_wallet: Please connect your wallet if you wish to confirm your current token balance
subscriptions_citizen_read_agreement: Please read the Citizenship Agreement carefully.
subscriptions_citizen_agree_to_token_ter: I confirm that I have read and agree to the <link1>Token Purchase Terms & Conditions</link1> and the <link2>OASA Whitepaper v1.2</link2>. I understand that $TDF tokens are utility tokens only, with no equity or profit rights, and that all purchases are final and non-refundable.
subscriptions_citizen_confirmation: Woohoo - you have become a TDF Citizen!
subscriptions_citizen_you_are_on_your_wa: Woohoo - you are on your way to becoming a TDF Citizen!
Woohoo - you are on your way to financing $TDF tokens!
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_det: You can choose to finance 30, 60, 90 or 120 tokens. Here are a few details about it:
Paid over 36 months via bank transfers
You get <link>stay credits</link> to be able to get the utility of all tokens ahead of owning them
Tokens accrue every 6 month if payments are made
How many tokens would you like to finance?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_you: You have chosen to finance {var} $TDF tokens. Here are the details of your payment plan:
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_hin: Hint: want to get tokens 5% cheaper?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_ban: From what bank account will you transfer the payments?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_dis: By clicking the 'Become Citizen' or 'Finance tokens' button, you agree to:
Make the initial down payment upon receiving the first invoice via email.
Ensure timely monthly payments of €{var} for the duration of the plan.
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_pay: Please make your €{downPayment} payment to IBAN: {closerIban} from your account ending in {userIbanLast4}.
token_sale_bank_transfer_existing_applic: You already have a pending bank transfer token sale application
If you proceed with a new application, existing application will be cancelled, and a new one will be created.
token_sale_bank_transfer_delete_error: Error with deleting existing bank transfer application
token_sale_bank_transfer_missing_sale_id: Sale information is missing. Use the back button and restart the token purchase flow.
oasa_address_value:
Industriestrasse 47, 6300 Zug, c/o Juris Services AG
Switzerland
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_aft: Your citizenship is pending. Once we receive your down payment, you'll be able to activate your citizenship. Once we receive the payment, we will send you a confirmation in 48 hours. If you do not receive the email, please send us a proof of payment to <link>space@traditionaldreamfactory.com</link>

Once we receive the payment, we will send you a confirmation of of yor financed token plan within 48h. If you do not receive the email, please send us a proof of payment to <link>space@traditionaldreamfactory.com</link>
subscriptions_citizen_user_page_why: Why do you want to become a member:
subscriptions_citizen_pending_payment: You have already applied for citizenship, and you have a pending payment
subscriptions_citizen_active_application: You already have an active financed token plan
subscriptions_citizen_cancelled: You have already applied for citizenship, but your application has been cancelled.
subscriptions_citizen_paid: You have already applied for citizenship, and you have made the latest payment.
subscriptions_citizen_completed: You have successfully completed your citizenship application.
referrals_invite_hint: Tap the field to select your link, then copy or share. Signups through this link count toward your rewards.
pricing_and_product_glamping_text_1: Get cosy in a glamping tent for you, yourself and you again. They are 5m in diameter! If you're sharing it with your partner, you'll get a double mattress with warm blankets and fluffy pillows. In case you want two singles, please let us know.
pricing_and_product_glamping_text_2: There's a lamp to give you light, and a plug for your electronics. Usually the tent will be inside our warehouse, or maybe there'll be availability in the land.
pricing_and_product_glamping_shared_text: Get cosy in a glamping tent for you, and two or three more folks. It's spacious and comfortable, don't worry - they are 5m in diameter. There's a lamp to give you light, and a plug for your electronics. Usually the tent will be inside our warehouse.
Compost toilets and showers are shared.
pricing_and_product_camping_text_1: Bring your own gear, or ask us if we can borrow you some. We recommend a camping mattress, a sleeping bag and a pillow. If it is winter, make sure your gear is warm and waterproof.
pricing_and_product_camping_text_2: Compost toilets and showers are shared.
pricing_and_product_van_parking_text_1: Bring your auto-home to TDF. We have spaces in the land that are flat, with shade and with electricity. Perfect for your home on the road.
pricing_and_product_van_parking_text_3: Compost toilets and showers are shared.

token_sale_heading_how: How would you like to buy your $TDF tokens?
token_sale_bank_transfer_no_wallet_intro: In order to receive your TDF tokens, you will need to connect a wallet to your account.
token_sale_validation_failed_error:
Error: While token transaction was successful, backend wasn't able to validate sale
{error_details}
token_sale_checkout_error_missing_sale_i: Sale information is missing. Use the back button or restart the token sale.
token_sale_checkout_error_zero_tokens: You must select at least one token to complete checkout.
token_sale_checkout_start_sale_flow_link: Return to start of token sale
token_sale_before_you_begin_text_1: You're about to secure your access rights to TDF — a step toward supporting regenerative real-world assets.
token_sale_before_you_begin_text_2: To keep things smooth and fair, here's how it works:
token_sale_before_you_begin_checklist_2_: Have Celo available for gas fees
Please buy CELO tokens (at least 0.1 CELO) on <link>Binance,</link> <link2>Coinbase</link2> or any exchange of your choice
token_sale_checklist_status_ready: All set! Your wallet is ready to continue.
token_sale_checklist_status_incomplete: Complete all checklist items to continue.
sale_summary_festive_lead: You're officially part of something bigger — thank you! Your payment went through beautifully; your receipt details are below.
sale_summary_pending_payment_lead: This sale is waiting for payment to confirm. Your order details are below; we'll update this page once payment is received.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_compact_intro: Pay the total below to the recipient account. Use the payment reference exactly — we need it to match your transfer.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_from_account: Send from your bank account ending in {lastFour}.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_footer: Your purchase is governed by the <termsLink>Token Purchase Terms & Conditions</termsLink>. The Tokens are utility tokens only—not securities, equity, or profit-sharing rights. Financed purchases are subject to deposit, payment schedule, tranche release and default rules described in the Terms. Tokens are typically issued within 7 business days after we receive your payment. Need help? Email proof of payment to space@traditionaldreamfactory.com.
token_financed_bank_transfer_footer: Your purchase is governed by the <termsLink>Token Purchase Terms & Conditions</termsLink>. The Tokens are utility tokens only—not securities, equity, or profit-sharing rights. Financed purchases are subject to deposit, payment schedule, tranche release and default rules described in the Terms. Financed tokens are minted in batches, at most six months after each monthly payment. You can claim utility right away by using your carrots—or ask the team. Need help? Email proof of payment to space@traditionaldreamfactory.com.
token_sale_before_you_begin_guide_2: Connect your Metamask wallet to the CELO network (press 'Add to Metamask' button in 'Celo Mainnet' section)
token_sale_gas_fees_note: Gas fees are paid in CELO not {reserveToken}. Max fee is ~0.0008 CELO
token_sale_price_disclaimer: The total {reserveToken} price in checkout can vary by up to 1%
token_sale_ceur_disclaimer: Make sure you have enough {reserveToken} balance in your wallet
token_sale_tdf_accommodation_heading: $TDF Unlocks Access to Accommodation at TDF
token_sale_food_heading: Did we mention our food production Yet?
token_sale_food_text: Fun Fact - This summer (2023) we have harvested at least 150 kg of food from our garden.
token_sale_ama_subheading: Join a webinar with our team and discuss how you can be a part of this.
token_sale_approval_error: Error approving {reserveToken}. Please, make sure the amount to approve you entered is ~5% greater than total.
token_sale_buy_error: Error purchasing $TDF. Please make sure you have sufficient {reserveToken} balance and CELO balance to pay gas fees.
token_sale_buy_error_max_supply: Cannot purchase $TDF: maximum supply reached. The token sale has reached its cap.
token_sale_buy_error_insufficient_balanc: Insufficient balance. Please make sure you have enough {reserveToken} and CELO for gas to complete this purchase.
insufficient_celo_for_gas: Your CELO balance is low, and transactions might fail. Please top up CELO on your wallet.
token_sale_not_enough_reserve_for_purcha: Not enough {reserveToken} on your wallet to purchase $TDF. Please top up your {reserveToken} balance.

subscriptions_citizen_introduce_yourself: Introduce yourself in discord to get vouched by other members:
token_sale_invite_page_title: The first land-based DAO In Europe is here!
token_sale_invite_page_description: This is an invite only sale. Haven't been invited yet? Join our Telegram and make friends - or tag @tdfinyourdreams on Twitter with #BEHHH.
token_sale_invite_page_cta: Already have an invite? Please log in.
token_sale_page_description: The first crypto token that provides you with housing + food, while regenerating the planet.
token_sale_page_food_disclaimer: Utility Fee charged separately - includes food, supplies, insurance, accounting, energy, water, sewage, internet, maintenance.
token_sale_invite_page_nominate_friends: (Optional) Nominate up to 5 friends to join
token_sale_invite_page_process_descripti: For each friend who joins the whitelist you get access 1 day earlier (max 5 days).
token_sale_invite_page_process_price: The price of the token goes up after each purchase, the sooner you purchase your tokens, the cheaper they are.

affiliate_dashboard_support_intro: Need help with your affiliate account or have questions about the program? Our dedicated affiliate support team is here to help you succeed.
affiliate_dashboard_support_response_tim: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.

engagement_enrichment_pending: Draft copy is not ready yet — waiting for the next enrichment run. Use Preview sample email to generate a preview now.

blog_editor_slug_help: Leave empty to auto-generate from title

projects_skills_and_qualifications_intro: What interests, qualifications or gifts you have?
projects_suggestions_intro: Do you have other suggestions/proposals for projects? Categories & Examples: activity spaces, social areas, playgrounds, tree houses, furniture, outdoor showers, toilets, gyms, buildings, tiny houses, domes, greenhouses, mushroom farm, yoga studio, music studio, co-living, art, smart systems (e.g. water filtration, biopools, renewable energy, kitchen & food flows, composting)...
projects_build_intro: Which of the ongoing projects can you (/would you like to) contribute to?
vouch_min_duration_not_met: The guest needs to stay for at least {var} days to be eligible for vouching

vouch_not_vouched_by_users: The user has not been vouched for

learn_subheading: Dive into TDF Learning Hub and tap into a reservoir of actionable knowledge.
learn_course_purchase_confirmation_messa:
Thank you for your purchase! 🌱

We will contact you soon with the course details.
projects_no_active_projects: There are no active projects currently.
projects_no_completed_projects: There are no completed projects currently.
report_user_question: Do you think {name} is not inline with our Community Values? Please explain which values and why.
report_user_unsafe: Are you feeling unsafe due to this person currently?
projects_starting_to_build: We are starting to build! TDF has secured funding to start major renovations. In Jan 2025, the first phase of accommodation will start with a professional contractor, and alongside that, we are self-building various projects to support the opening of TDF V2.
projects_requirements_value: 6 hours per day, 1 month minimum ✅. Free accommodation & food (glamping tents and dorms available, or bring your van)
projects_token_rewards_value: We will be offering tokens to builders who take projects from start to completion. Rewards will be negotiated with the team.
projects_community_culture_value: Experience co-living with fellow builders and the TDF team. We will have regular community activities, saunas, experiential dinners, music jams, embodiment practices, yoga, massage, and more 🥙💃🏽🔥🎶🎭
projects_booking_recommendation: Please try to book your stay starting from the 1st or the 15th of each month so you arrive with other people and support our onboarding process.
volunteers_intro_1: We are excited to extend an invitation to join us at the Traditional Dream Factory, a regenerative farm and co-living development in Abela, Alentejo, Portugal.
volunteers_intro_2: We are looking for enthusiastic individuals who are interested in living, learning, and contributing to a vibrant and growing community based on respect for the land and each other.
volunteers_intro_3: As a volunteer at TDF, you will have the chance to participate in a variety of activities, events and workshops happening throughout the season.
volunteers_intro_4: Volunteer programs always start on Sunday and we ask you to arrive on this day for a smooth onboarding experience. Email us to find out the next start dates at space@traditionaldreamfactory.com
volunteers_requirements_value: 4 hours per day, 2 weeks minimum ✅ Free accommodation: shared dorms available, or bring your own tent or van  ✅
volunteers_community_meals_value: 3 home cooked vegetarian meals a day with sweet treats, fancy teas and coffee from our cafe. Vegan, gluten free and dairy free options are available. (Please note that volunteers pay for food unless you have a van kitchen and can prepare your own without using TDF's facilities).
volunteers_community_culture_value: To join us, you should align with our community's values, be open to learning, sharing, and working, and be excited to contribute to our collective efforts. Our community is about more than just work; it's about having fun, growing together, and sharing in the co-creation of our land and experiences. 🥙💃🏽🔥🎶🎭
volunteers_skills_and_qualifications_tit: Skill & qualifications that can support us 👍🏼
volunteers_skill_gardening_value: Experience hands-on regenerative agriculture, learn about permaculture, and contribute to our food production.
volunteers_skill_hospitality_value: Assist in maintaining a welcoming environment for all of our community members and visitors, including cleaning, bed dressing, and making people feel at home.
volunteers_skill_kitchen_value: Help prepare delicious and nutritious meals using fresh produce from our garden.
volunteers_skill_building_value: Use and develop your skills to contribute to various building projects around the property, from furniture to social areas, outdoor showers, or building smart systems like helophyte filters or biopools.
volunteers_skill_mushroom_farm_value: Support our mycology operations by helping with mushroom cultivation, harvesting, processing, and learning about sustainable fungal production systems.
volunteers_skill_others_value: As part of a dynamic community, there will be many other opportunities to learn, contribute, and grow.
volunteers_commitment: We ask for a minimum commitment of two weeks and recommend you to come and stay for a month if possible. In return, you'll be immersed in our community, gaining invaluable experience and insights, and contributing to a meaningful project.
volunteers_expectation: We expect volunteers to contribute four hours of work each day, five days a week.
join_community_description: Get the latest announcements, event updates, and news delivered directly to you.
join_community_banner_subtitle: Follow our Telegram channel for announcements, events, and news.
volunteers_recommend_read: Before you apply, we recommend reading our
volunteers_pink_paper_details: which details our community's culture and processes.
volunteers_vision_resonates: If our vision resonates with you and you're eager to play, learn, and create with us, we'd love to hear from you. Check our
volunteers_schedule_call: and let's schedule a call to know each other by sending an email to

expense_tracking_dashboard_info_start_da: Expense tracking in this dashboard includes data from January 1, 2026 onward.

roles_no_roles_available: No roles available at the moment.
roles_page_description_1: Join our vibrant regenerative community where work and life blend seamlessly. We're looking for passionate individuals who want to contribute to a sustainable future while living in harmony with nature and like-minded people. Our roles offer more than just employment - they provide an opportunity to be part of a growing ecosystem that values collaboration, learning, and environmental stewardship.
roles_page_description_2: Whether you're skilled in gardening, building, hospitality, or have other talents to share, we welcome diverse perspectives and abilities. In return, you'll experience community living, learn regenerative practices, and contribute to meaningful projects that make a difference.
error_saving_notes: Error saving notes. Please try again.
token_sale_accommodation_heading: Transform Tokens into Lifetime Stay Rights
token_sale_accommodation_description: $TDF converts directly into nights of stay at TDF.
token_sale_whitepaper_description: Complete technical details of the $TDF token, governance model, and OASA ecosystem
token_sale_token_night_value: 1 $TDF = 1 night per year in standard lodging (utility fee applies).
token_sale_token_access_description: Tokens unlock your preferred room; the utility fee sustains services and operations.
token_sale_booking_approval: Bookings require Space-Host approval; Citizens benefit from instant booking.
token_sale_governance_rights: Each token carries voting rights within the TDF DAO.
subscriptions_citizen_already_member_des: You can purchase additional tokens to increase your participation in the community and unlock more benefits.
home_meta_description: Build and manage regenerative communities with Closer - accommodations, bookings, events, and web3 governance.
home_cta_button: Launch your web3 land based project
home_hero_subtitle: Join the Traditional Dream Factory and help create sustainable, thriving communities
citizenship_page_meta_description: Citizenship: belonging, governance, and access through tokens.
philosophy_intro: Understanding the principles and evidence behind commons-based governance—from historical successes spanning millennia to digital commons generating trillions in value today.
philosophy_cta_description: Become part of a community building regenerative villages that unite technology, community, and nature.
philosophy_commons_governance_subtitle: Elinor Ostrom's eight design principles for successful commons—proven across 800+ cases worldwide.
philosophy_commons_governance_descriptio: Discover the eight design principles that have enabled communities to successfully govern shared resources for centuries.
philosophy_tragedy_myth_subtitle: Why the 'Tragedy of the Commons' narrative gets history backwards.
philosophy_tragedy_myth_description: Hardin's famous essay conflated unmanaged open-access with governed commons. Here's what the evidence actually shows.
philosophy_commons_exclosure_subtitle: Protecting communities from extractive forces, not excluding commoners.
philosophy_commons_exclosure_description: Inverting historical enclosure: creating boundaries that keep extractive forces out while enabling community stewardship.
philosophy_digital_commons_subtitle: From open-source software to blockchain governance—commons at trillion-dollar scale.
philosophy_digital_commons_description: Open source creates $8.8 trillion in value. Wikipedia. Blockchain governance. Digital commons are proving the model at scale.
philosophy_shared_abundance_subtitle: Building the governance infrastructure for collective prosperity.
philosophy_shared_abundance_description: The question isn't whether commons can work at scale. The question is whether we will build the exclosures that protect them.
footer_philosophy_tagline: Building the governance infrastructure for shared abundance—encoding principles proven across millennia with tools built for tomorrow.
footer_mission: Pioneering regenerative villages that unite technology, community & nature.
privacy_policy_meta: Learn how {platformName} collects, uses, and protects your personal information across our platform for regenerative communities.
privacy_policy_section_1_intro: {platformName} is operated by {legalEntityName}, located in {legalCity}, {legalCountry} ("we," "our," or "us"). We operate a platform that enables regenerative communities to manage accommodations, bookings, events, subscriptions, governance, and community resources. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform and services.
privacy_policy_section_1_agreement: By accessing or using {platformName}, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the terms of this policy, please do not access the platform.
privacy_policy_section_2_1_intro: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when using our services, including:
privacy_policy_section_2_1_item_1: Name, email address, phone number, and postal address
privacy_policy_section_2_1_item_2: Date of birth and nationality (for booking and compliance purposes)
privacy_policy_section_2_1_item_3: Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
privacy_policy_section_2_1_item_4: Profile information, photos, and biographical details
privacy_policy_section_2_1_item_5: Government-issued identification (when required for accommodation bookings)
privacy_policy_section_2_2_intro: When participating in community features, we may collect:
privacy_policy_section_2_2_item_2: Voting records and governance participation data
privacy_policy_section_2_3_intro: When you access our platform, we automatically collect:
privacy_policy_section_2_3_item_1: Device information (browser type, operating system, device identifiers)
privacy_policy_section_2_3_item_3: Usage data (pages visited, features used, time spent)
privacy_policy_section_3_intro: We use collected information for the following purposes:
privacy_policy_section_3_1_item_4: Facilitating volunteer coordination and task management
privacy_policy_section_3_3_item_1: Analyzing usage patterns to improve services
privacy_policy_section_3_3_item_3: Preventing fraud and ensuring platform security
privacy_policy_section_4_intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy_policy_section_4_1_text: Communities using {platformName} receive access to member data necessary for operating their services. Each community may have additional privacy practices, and we encourage you to review their specific policies.
privacy_policy_section_4_2_intro: We share information with third-party service providers who assist in:
privacy_policy_section_4_2_item_1: Payment processing (Stripe and other payment providers)
privacy_policy_section_4_3_text: When using token-based features, certain information is recorded on public blockchain networks (such as Celo). This includes wallet addresses and transaction records, which are publicly visible and immutable by design. We do not control blockchain networks and cannot delete on-chain data.
privacy_policy_section_4_4_text: We may disclose information when required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.
privacy_policy_section_5_intro: We retain personal information for as long as necessary to:
privacy_policy_section_5_item_1: Provide our services and maintain your account
privacy_policy_section_5_item_2: Comply with legal obligations (including tax and financial reporting)
privacy_policy_section_5_text: Your data is retained in perpetuity unless you choose to delete it. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time through your account settings in the platform UI, or via our API. Governance and voting records recorded on-chain cannot be deleted due to the immutable nature of blockchain technology.
privacy_policy_section_6_intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacy_policy_section_6_access_text: Request a copy of personal information we hold about you
privacy_policy_section_6_correction_text: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
privacy_policy_section_6_deletion_text: Request deletion of your personal information (subject to legal retention requirements)
privacy_policy_section_6_portability_tex: Request your data in a portable format
privacy_policy_section_6_objection_text: Object to certain processing of your data
privacy_policy_section_6_withdraw_text: Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
privacy_policy_section_6_text: You can exercise most of these rights directly through your account settings, including deleting all your data. For additional requests, contact us at {teamEmail}. Note that on-chain blockchain data cannot be modified or deleted.
privacy_policy_section_7_intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
privacy_policy_section_7_text: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect platform functionality.
privacy_policy_section_8_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_policy_section_9_text_1: Our servers are currently located in Germany within the European Union. Your information may also be processed by third-party service providers in other jurisdictions, including the United States. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for such transfers in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy_policy_section_9_text_2: In the future, {platformName} intends to deploy its own cloud infrastructure hosted by the regenerative communities themselves, further decentralizing data storage and aligning with our values of community sovereignty.
privacy_policy_section_10_text: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child, we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy_policy_section_11_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on our platform and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_policy_section_12_intro: For questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at:
privacy_policy_section_12_platform_info: This platform is developed by Closer, a digital common stewarded by
privacy_policy_accounting_entities_intro: The following legal entities are responsible for different services provided through {platformName}:
privacy_policy_footer: This privacy policy applies to the {platformName} platform and all communities operating on it. Individual communities may have additional privacy practices and policies that supplement this document.
invest_page_description: Join our community fundraiser. Back the project with tokens or contributions and help us open as a licensed hospitality project in Portugal. Every backer gets us closer.
invest_share_text: Back TDF's regenerative coliving campaign in Portugal — community-owned, tokenized fundraising
invest_hero_subtitle: We're in the final stretch. Back our campaign to help us open as a licensed hospitality project. Choose your reward — tokens, subscription, or a call to discuss larger support. Every contribution counts.
invest_milestone_thank_you: Thank you to every backer! On to the next milestone.
invest_story_subtitle: Four years of work has created a thriving regenerative village with operating infrastructure, active community, and documented ecological impact.
invest_roadmap_subtitle: Each phase closes a critical requirement for opening TDF as a licensed hospitality project.
invest_phase_urgency: Deadline approaching — we're not there yet. Every backer helps.
invest_cta_choose_contribution: How would you like to participate?
donate_session_missing: We could not load your donation checkout. Please start again from the donation page.
donate_page_subtitle: Support land stewardship and regenerative development.
donate_bank_eur_only: Transfers must be in EUR so we can match your payment (Monerium reconciliation).
donate_bank_pending_note: Matching runs on a scheduled job after your bank sends the transfer—not instantly. You can leave this page; we will email you when the donation is confirmed.
donate_create_invalid_response: We could not start this donation. Please try again or contact support.
donate_crypto_send_exact: Send exactly {amount} in {token} to the recipient address below.
donate_crypto_config_error: Crypto donations are not configured yet. Please choose another method or contact support.
donate_crypto_wallet_disabled: Wallet payments are not available in this environment. Choose bank or card, or contact support.
donate_crypto_wallet_hint: Connect a wallet on Celo, then send the exact amount in one transaction. You need a small CELO balance for network fees.
donate_crypto_unsupported_token: This app does not know how to send “{token}” from your wallet yet. Choose bank or card, or contact support.
donate_card_stripe_error: Card payment failed. Please try again.
donate_card_stripe_unexpected_status: We could not confirm the card payment. Please try again.
donate_bank_intro: Transfer {amount} to the OASA account below. We will confirm your donation once the funds arrive.
donate_bank_memo_block: IMPORTANT: Add reference "{reference}" to your payment. This is required for payment tracking.
donate_bank_followup: If you do not receive a confirmation email, please send proof of payment to space@traditionaldreamfactory.com.
invest_testimonials_subtitle: {count} token holders are already in. Here's what some of them say.
invest_testimonial_0_quote: I wanted land and governance to stay aligned with ecology—not speculation. This model finally felt honest.
invest_testimonial_1_quote: The transparency around use of funds and on-chain votes sold me. It is rare to see a community ship this clearly.
invest_testimonial_2_quote: I backed because access, stays, and stewardship are tied together. It is a practical commons, not a whitepaper.
invest_rewards_subtitle: Every tier gives you real access to the village. Pick the level that fits.
webinar_section_title: Join our call. Ask questions. Get the details.
webinar_section_desc: Register for our upcoming webinar to learn more and connect with the community.
token_price_history_note: This is the bonding curve price, not market value.
stripe_connect_description: Authorize your existing Stripe account to connect to Closer platform.
stripe_connect_success_copy_hint: The connection is successful. You can now use the Closer platform with your Stripe account.
stripe_connect_csrf_error_body: The secure session for this connection is missing or expired. Go back to Stripe Connect and start again.
agent_chat_page_meta_description: Ask questions about the community catalog and get grounded answers.
agent_chat_subheading: Ask about bookings, tokens, events, and other catalog topics.
agent_chat_empty_state: Send a message to start. Answers use the knowledge catalog.
agent_chat_invalid_room: This conversation could not be resumed. Start a new chat.
agent_chat_error_send: Could not send your message. Try again.
agent_chat_no_history: No conversations yet. Start a new chat.
